metadata.description: Fix citation formatting in ArXiv manuscript - citations appearing twice and not in parentheses

summary: Fixed citation formatting in ArXiv manuscript. Changed \usepackage{natbib} to \usepackage[round]{natbib} to switch from square brackets to round parentheses for all citations. Generated the missing .bbl file via bibtex compilation. Full pdflatex→bibtex→pdflatex→pdflatex pipeline completed cleanly with no citation warnings.

annotation.content: ArXiv citation formatting fix: The natbib package defaults to square brackets [Author, Year] with plainnat style. Adding \usepackage[round]{natbib} switches to round parentheses (Author, Year). ArXiv also requires a pre-compiled .bbl file since it runs pdflatex but not bibtex — the missing .bbl was likely the root cause of "citations appearing twice" on the ArXiv version.
